## Substrate-generic vs fork-specific

- [ ] **Substrate-generic** — any Inkwell fork benefits; the change belongs upstream
- [ ] **Fork-specific** — applies to mumega.com only; should NOT land in substrate

If fork-specific, this PR probably belongs in a downstream fork rather than here. Coordinate with the steward before opening.
